rows.description: Straight-line arithmetic smoke row on the typed stack-bytecode surface.
rows.notes: Keeps the smallest compiled boundary row visible before control or memory widening.

rows.description: Counted loop row with repeated stack updates and taken branches.
rows.notes: Exercises bounded loop control without widening the opcode surface.

rows.description: Indirect overwrite-after-gap row on the admitted bytecode lowering surface.
rows.notes: Carries latest-write recovery into the compiled-boundary suite without reopening broad Wasm or arbitrary C.

rows.description: Single bounded call/return row with one declared frame-local slot.
rows.notes: Keeps call-frame retrieval explicit on the compiled-boundary suite.

rows.description: Branch-fallthrough revisit row that preserves alternate-path control without executing a broader call family.
rows.notes: Separates branch control from the shallower call/return roundtrip row.
